narrative:
Precinct Wakeman Village (precinct in Huron County) has 637 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.3%, a clear Republican lean of 6.6 percentage points.
